case_title: MARTHA ELENA RUIZ ORTIZ VS. COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUIZ ORTIZ, MARTHA ELENA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-22-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-22-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---ELLEN ROSENTHAL. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JUANA NUNLEY--AGENT OF THE LANDLORD AND DARLENA CARTER--PROPERTY MANAGER.PLAINTIFF WAS HELPED BY ARTURO-EDWIN AMARDAR--PARRA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
